    Tests Block#clone

    Tests Block#clone

    testCNSToBTC_randomDifficulties() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.utils.BitcoinDifficultyUtilityTest
     
    testConstructor_InitializesToIdleState() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that constructor initializes to IDLE state.
    testConstructor_NullNode_ThrowsNullPointerException() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that constructor throws NullPointerException when node is null.
    testGoToIdleState_AlreadyIdle_ThrowsIllegalStateException() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that goToIdleState() throws when already in IDLE state.
    testGoToIdleState_GuardsAgainstInvalidTransitions() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that goToIdleState() throws when called inappropriately.
    testGoToMonitoringState_AlreadyMonitoring_ThrowsIllegalStateException() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that goToMonitoringState() throws when already in MONITORING state.
    testGoToMonitoringState_GuardsAgainstInvalidTransitions() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that goToMonitoringState() throws when in ATTACKING state.
    testInHiddenChain_AfterCancelAttack_ReturnsFalse() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    After the attack is cancelled the hidden chain is cleared, so inHiddenChain() must return false for any transaction.
    testInHiddenChain_MonitoringState_ReturnsFalse() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    When in MONITORING state (attack not yet started, hidden chain empty), inHiddenChain() must return false.
    testInHiddenChain_NoAttackInProgress_ReturnsFalse() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    When no attack is in progress (hiddenChainTip is null), inHiddenChain() must return false for any transaction regardless of its ID.
    testInHiddenChain_TransactionInTipBlock_ReturnsTrue() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    A transaction contained in the single hidden block at the tip must be found.
    testInHiddenChain_TransactionNotInAnyBlock_ReturnsFalse() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    A transaction that has never been seen by the node must not be found in the hidden chain, even during an active attack.
    testSetAttackPower_NonPositive_ThrowsIllegalArgumentException() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that setAttackPower() throws when power is invalid input: '<'= 0.
    testSetAttackPower_Positive_Succeeds() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that setAttackPower() accepts positive values.
    testSetReleaseAdvantage_AcceptsAnyValue() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that setReleaseAdvantage() accepts any value.
    testStateTransition_IdleToMonitoring_Succeeds() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that valid state transition IDLE → MONITORING succeeds.
    testStateTransition_MonitoringToIdle_Succeeds() - Method in class dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.HiddenChainAttackBehaviorParameterTest
    Tests that valid state transition MONITORING → IDLE succeeds.
